detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use xdmapcie driver.

sect1.title: xdmapcie_rc_enumerate_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XDmapcie driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as a root port.

Drivers support both R5 and a78 cortex processors in xdmapcie_rc_enumerate_example.c
QDMA PL PCIe4
QDMA PL PCIe5
XDMA

Drivers support only a78 cortex processor in xdmapcie_rc_enumerate_example.c
CPM5 controller 0
CPM5 controller 1
CPM4
